arts.ttl: Robbie Williams handed Club World Cup final role as Chelsea face PSG in USA
arts.sum: Chelsea and Paris Saint-Germain face off in the first Club World Cup final under the new format - with FIFA taking a SuperBowl style approach to the occasion by enlisting Robbie Williams as the pre-match entertainment

arts.ttl: PSG boss Luis Enrique issues 'unforgettable' demand ahead of Club World Cup final vs Chelsea
arts.sum: Reigning Champions League winners PSG will lock horns with Chelsea in the Club World Cup final on Sunday and Luis Enrique has warned the Blues his side are chasing "history" at the MetLife Stadium

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs. PSG: Four Key Battles That Could Decide Club World Cup Final
arts.sum: It’s a bit silly that you can add players to your squad midway through the tournament, but Chelsea have taken advantage of FIFA’s allowance by signing João Pedro, who could function as their x-factor in Sunday’s final. Statistically, Bayern Munich were the most proficient pressers at the tournament, but PSG rank fourth for shots and second for goals resulting from high turnovers per 90 minutes (via Opta ).

arts.ttl: Donnarumma contract dispute at PSG has Chelsea and Man Utd on alert
arts.sum: Italy international Gianluigi Donnarumma’s future at Paris Saint-Germain is increasingly in doubt over a new...

arts.ttl: Chelsea 'interested in PSG goalkeeper Gianluigi Donnarumma' as the Italian enters the final 12 months of his contract
arts.sum: The Italian shot-stopper enjoyed the most successful season of his career in 2024-25, registering 12 clean sheets as PSG marched to an imperious treble-winning campaign.

arts.ttl: Club World Cup final: How Chelsea, PSG compare; who will win?
arts.sum: One of Chelsea or PSG will win the first expanded Club World Cup on Sunday, so how do they match up ahead of the final?

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs. PSG: Complete Head-to-Head Record Ahead of Club World Cup Final
arts.sum: Chelsea ’s first ever meeting with PSG came all the way back in 2004 during the group stage of the Champions League and it’s fair to say the former had the first laugh. The Champions League has been the stage for a host of previous meetings, including duels across three successive seasons in the mid-2010s.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs. PSG: Club World Cup Final Combined XI
arts.sum: RW: Désiré Doué —After stealing the show in the Champions League final against Inter Milan, could Doué do the same against Chelsea in the Club World Cup’s big match? He’s one of the best midfielders in world football at present.

arts.ttl: Chelsea keen on PSG star – Blues can take advantage of uncertainty
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain will face Chelsea in the FIFA Club World Cup final on Sunday. They won the treble last season and will be looking at add another trophy to their cabinet. Gianluigi Donnarumma was one of the standout players for PSG and his fine displays have attracted interest from several clubs, including Chelsea. arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca will not change his preparations to face ‘best in the world’ PSG
arts.sum: Chelsea take on the Champions League winners in the final of the Club World Cup on Sunday.
